feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I'll Bleed Until I Find You
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitRescue

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,786Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 45

Summary: Buck goes back into the water without thinking, without caring that his leg is already failing him or that the current is still strong enough to drag him out to sea. Buck finds Christopher. He brings him back. But when he wakes up, all he can remember is the moment Christopher was gone, the broken glasses in his hand, and Eddie’s trust turning into something Buck no longer thinks he deserves. Or What if Buck saved Christopher from the tsunami, and woke up convinced Eddie would never trust him again?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My mind is reaping the troubles from my soul
entry.summary:
Author: thistvgirl

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,561Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 0

Summary: But now he doesn’t want to waste another decade, but he’ll still wait, because that’s what Buck needs. He’ll wait as long as it takes for Buck to heal.Or : As they return home from New Mexico, Eddie realises that he's in love with Buck but it happens at the worst time as Buck's scars from New Mexico runs pretty deep.

entry.title: On Starting Over
entry.summary:
Author: RighteousPunk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,505Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 1

Summary: “Remember how Ravi said I needed to get laid?” Buck asks at last. Karen gasps, her hand coming to cover her mouth in shock. “Buck. You didn’t,” she sighs. “What, you—” Hen looks like she can’t believe her ears, shaking her head. “You slept with your future nanny during the interview? “That’s highly unprofessional,” Karen adds with a concerned frown. Okay. Well. Maybe Buck shouldn’t have started there. “No! I— It was before, okay?” Hen squints her eyes, trying to understand. “So, this man turns up to your house, you say hi, you have sex, and then you start asking about his former employers’ references?” Or: Buck needs a nanny. Eddie is desperatly looking for a job. They might end up finding more than they asked for.

entry.title: I watched you fall, and I did nothing.(He couldn't even call for help.)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiecokkieta

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,032Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 28

Summary: After the team's private lives were laid bare—and after Buck, realizing he had hurt his family in a way he never could have foreseen, withdrew his lawsuit—what transpired at the grocery store, and everything that followed... Happy endings aren't really my thing—I mean, I think they'll get over this lawsuit business pretty quickly.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 181,958Chapters: 45/?Kudos: 108

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: all the love you won’t forget
entry.summary:
Author: rhodeys

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,828Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: The doctor tilts her head to the only source of warmth in the cold, hospital room. “And who’s he?”Buck’s eyes drift to Eddie, hungry for the sight of him. They fall upon the tense line of Eddie’s shoulders, the firm press of otherwise plump lips, watching like the very air in his lungs depend on Buck’s answer. “That’s Eddie,” Buck answers, and the smile sneaks up on him. “Eddie Diaz. My partner.” There. Relief washes through Eddie in a visible wave: his shoulders drop, features relaxing with the soft push of an exhale. Buck warms at the sight. Right answer. — A polysemy is a word with multiple, related meanings. The word partner, for example, can mean close friendship, a teammate, a co-parent. To someone else, it can also mean a lover.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My advice is always ruin the friendship (Better that than regret it for all time)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,287Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 368

Summary: He looked down, shocked to see Christopher’s number displayed across his screen. They had texted occasionally, but it had been over six years since they last saw each other, and since Christopher never called him, something was clearly wrong. “Chris?” “Hey Buck, I know it's been a while, and I’m sorry to be so blunt, but Dad was hurt in a fire six weeks ago and has been in a coma ever since.” The color drains from Buck’s face. “I begged them to let him fight, but they won’t listen. Grandma and Abuelo, they want to…” He doesn’t let Christopher finish, “Christopher, is your dad dead?” He braces himself for the answer. It may have been over six years, but deep down, Buck’s feelings for his former partner have never changed. “No, because they aren’t in Dad’s power of attorney, you are.” Christopher tells him, “They tried to hide his will, but when they suggested pulling the plug, the hospital contacted the fire station that Dad works at, just to verify, and his captain turned it over. They couldn’t remove life support because they need you to sign off. I need you too…” Buck doesn’t even hear the last part as he’s sucked into his own thoughts.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: we should talk
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,418Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 170

Summary: Eddie simply cannot know that he is currently naked. That would be catastrophic.  “Um, I— did you need anything? I’m kind of in the middle of something,” Buck says, which. Okay. That did not sound convincing. He adds, “I can call you back in ten?”  “I thought you just woke up?” Eddie says, and, fuck— Buck did basically say that.  Carefully, he says, “I did.”  “So what were you—?”  God, this is mortifying. This might be the worst thing that’s ever happened to Buck, and he’s been caught in, like, four natural disasters. And also struck by lightning. And had a fire engine fall on him. He even dated (he shudders at the thought) Tommy Kinard.   “Eddie,” he says. He doesn’t know what else to say.  “What? If you need to pee you can just mute yourself.”  “Eddie, that’s not—”  “Then what?” Eddie laughs. “If you’re still in bed, you can’t ha— oh.”Or: Buck answers the phone in the middle of jerking off. For some reason, Eddie asks him not to hang up.

entry.title: Therian Lies The Problem
entry.summary:
Author: Mythicus

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,894Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Eddie, how do you tell people you've been married for almost a decade. A man you haven't even mentioned to them at all in the last 6 years you've known them. I can't even tell them how we met. I can't even tell you, ask I was able to tell you is we met in the sandbox when I was  SEAL. Another thing they don't know about~~OR~~Buck's freaking out about the husband the 118 knows nothing about till they get a call to do with a supernatural being

entry.summary:
Author: gika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,720Chapters: 10/24Kudos: 87

entry.title: She’s Laughing Drawing Aces
entry.summary:
Author: Emlyn_bees

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,029Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: “Whoa, Buck are you good?” Eddie questioned holding her hands out landing on Bucks biceps right under the hem of her shirt sleeve “‘m fine.” The truth was she was not fine, and had been avoiding Eddie ever since she got back from El Paso and Buck moved out. And she thought she was doing a good job of not making it a big thing, just slowly fading into the background of Eddie's life. But Buck didn't want to, she wanted to be a part of Eddie’s life for the rest of hers, and be there for the hard days and the good days, the mundane and the exciting moments. But that wasn’t going to happen… Because Eddie is straight. And would never be in the cards for Buck.   OR   Buck is having a rough time at a bar… Eddie finds her.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

  • no beta we die like buck for 3 minutes and 17 seconds

entry.title: Don't leave, I don't wanna start over
entry.summary:
Author: 1suspiciousactivity

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,344Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 15

Summary: It happened so naturally, like every other habit he created with Buck, but the realization set in to Eddie like a punch in the gut. He didn’t mean it, really, but falling in love with him was the easiest thing he had ever done, and that may be the reason why he didn’t see it evolving. But it did. And he noticed. And he doesn’t know what to do with it. OR Eddie realises he’s in love with Buck and he gets weird. I’m working on the drama the actors asked for!

entry.title: Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,887Chapters: 23/23Kudos: 172

Summary: "Buck!" Eddies voice rang through the space, abruptly cut off by the deafening sound of crumpling concrete hitting the ground. Eddie stared at the rubble now blocking the way between himself and Buck. "Buck," Eddie whimpered as he dropped to his knees in front of the pile of rubble Buck was buried under. OR If episode 9x3 actually included the subway collapse from the promo, because I'm so mad about that.Continuing the story using that as a plot point. It will be canon divergent from that point onward in season 9, episode 3.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
